wordplay_note: Everyman name — a common man in an uncommon world
card_description: Al Miller is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Simulacra*. Citizen who seeks passage to Mars to escape the Simulacra regime. Name note: Everyman name — a common man in an uncommon world. The common man trying to flee the political machine. First appears in *The Simulacra*.

reference.brief: Citizen who seeks passage to Mars to escape the Simulacra regime
reference.significance: The common man trying to flee the political machine
